Component.Name: DetailFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 103; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 23; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Center; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(ButtonBarVisible) = 1; ANIM: FromRight; MARGIN: 0,0,0,0.25; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(1) TARGET(UNKNOWN1)

Component.Name: DropSeqEdit
Component.Caption: C(ShipToStatic)
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE SLCustomers( PROPERTIES(CustSeq, Name, CustNum) DISPLAY(1,2)FILTER(CustNum = FC(DropShipNoCEdit) and ShowInShipToDropDownList = 1))

Component.Name: DropSeqGridCol
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE SLCustomers( PROPERTIES(CustSeq, Name, CustNum) DISPLAY(1,2)FILTER(CustNum = FC(DropShipNoGridCol) and ShowInShipToDropDownList = 1))

Component.Name: HeaderFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 20; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Stretch; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0.3,0.625,0.17) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 63; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Left; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0,0.17,0.17) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 15; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 5; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Left; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0,0,0.25) REGION5(ID: UNKNOWN5; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION6(ID: UNKNOWN6; VALUE: 23; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION7(ID: UNKNOWN7; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(0) TARGET(UNKNOWN0)

Component.Name: MainFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(VerticalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 15fl; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 85fl; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(0)

Component.Name: PoNumEdit
Component.Caption: C(PoNumStatic)
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE SL.SLPos( PROPERTIES(Type, PoNum, Stat, OrderDate, VendNum, VendorName, VendOrder, VenCurrCode) DISPLAY(2,3,4,5,6,7) )

Component.Name: PoNumGridCol
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE SL.SLPos( PROPERTIES(Type, PoNum, Stat, OrderDate, VendNum, VendorName, VendOrder, VenCurrCode) DISPLAY(2,3,4,5,6,7) )

EventHandler.Name: AllocateLandedCost
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLPos.AllocSp( PARMS(VAR P(PoNum), RVAR V(ProcessLevel), RVAR V(PromptMsg), RVAR V(PromptButtons), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: CascadeStatusChange
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLPos.CascadeStatusChangeSp( PARMS(VAR P(PoNum), VAR P(DerOldStat), VAR P(Stat), VAR V(PerformUpdate), RVAR V(vInfobar)) )

EventHandler.Name: CheckChangeStatus
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLPos.PochgP1Sp( PARMS(VAR P(PoNum), VAR P(Stat), RVAR V(POAbort), RVAR V(PoChgErrPromptMessage), RVAR V(PoChgPromptMessage), RVAR V(PoChgPromptButtons)) )

EventHandler.Name: CheckPOLineDropShipToType
EventHandler.Response: SLPos.CheckPOLineDropShipToTypeSp( PARMS(VAR P(PoNum), RVAR V(LineDropShipToTypeVar), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: CheckPoLineStatus
EventHandler.Response: SLPos.CheckPOLineStatusSp( PARMS(VAR P(PoNum), RVAR V(LineStatusVar), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: DataChangePOVendNum
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLPos.VendorWhseDefaultSp( PARMS(VAR P(VendNum), RVAR P(Whse), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: DropShipToAddress
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLPos.GetDropShipToAddrWithPhoneSp( PARMS(VAR P(ShipAddr), VAR P(DropShipNo), VAR P(DropSeq), VAR V(Parm_Site), RVAR P(FormatedShipToAddress)) )

EventHandler.Name: DropShipToDAddress
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLPos.GetDropShipToAddrWithPhoneSp( PARMS(VAR P(ShipAddr), VAR P(DropShipNo), VAR P(DropSeq), VAR V(Parm_Site), RVAR P(FormatedShipToAddress)) )

EventHandler.Name: DropShipToWAddress
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLPos.GetDropShipToAddrWithPhoneSp( PARMS(VAR P(ShipAddr), VAR P(Whse), VAR P(DropSeq), VAR V(Parm_Site), RVAR P(FormatedShipToAddress)) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchPurchaseOrderReceiving
EventHandler.Response: PurchaseOrderReceiving( SETVARVALUES(ParentFormName=PurchaseOrders) LINKBY(PoNum=PoNum) SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(PoNumVar=PV(PoNum), PoVendNumVar=PV(VendNum), FindBy_PoNumVar=PV(PoNum), VendNameVar=PV(VendorName)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: LcrNumChanged
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLPos.LcrNumWarningSp( PARMS(VAR P(VendLcrNum),VAR P(VendNum),VAR P(PoNum),RVAR V(PromptMsg),RVAR V(PromptButtons),MESSAGE)ERRORMESSAGE(mValidatorMethodMessage))

EventHandler.Name: LinkSourceSite
EventHandler.Response: SLPos.PreCheckLinkSourceSiteCOSp( PARMS(VAR P(PoNum), RVAR V(PromptMsg), RVAR V(PromptButtons), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mValidatorMethodMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: LinkSourceSite
EventHandler.Response: SLPos.DemandingPoSourceCoSyncSp( PARMS(VAR P(SourceSite), VAR V(Parm_Site), VAR P(SourceSite), VAR V(Parm_Site), VAR P(PoNum), VAR, VAR, MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: msgPoStatusChangeNotValid
EventHandler.Response: MsgApp(Clear, Prompt, SuccessFailure, mE=MustCompareList, STRINGS(sPOStatus), VV(strPoStatusList))

EventHandler.Name: PODateChanged
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_PODateChanged_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.IsCurrentObjectNew Then ThisForm.GenerateEvent("UpdateExchangeRate") End If End Sub End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Name: RunPurchaseOrderBlanketLineReleases
EventHandler.Response: PurchaseOrderBlanketReleases( SETVARVALUES(ParentFormName=PurchaseOrders) LINKBY(PoNum=PoNum) RLACS() SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(PoTypeOnLink=P(Type), PoStat=P(Stat), PoOrderDate=P(OrderDate), PoVendNum=P(VendNum), VenadrName=P(VendorName), PoVendorPo=P(VendOrder), DerPoChangeNum=P(DerPchChgNum), DerPoChangeStat=P(DerPchStat), CurrCode=P(PoCurrCode), PoExchRate=P(ExchRate), PoTaxCode1Default=P(TaxCode1), PoTaxCode2Default=P(TaxCode2), PoBlnEffDate=P(EffDate), PoBlnExpDate=P(ExpDate)) )

EventHandler.Name: RunPurchaseOrderBlanketLines
EventHandler.Response: PurchaseOrderBlanketLines( SETVARVALUES(ParentFormName=PurchaseOrders) LINKBY(PoNum=PoNum) RLACS() SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(PoTypeOnLink=P(Type), PoStatDefault=P(Stat), PoOrderDateDefault=P(OrderDate), PoVendNumDefault=P(VendNum), VenadrNameDefault=P(VendorName), PoVendorPoDefault=P(VendOrder), DerPoChangeNumDefault=P(DerPchChgNum), DerPoChangeStatDefault=P(DerPchStat), CurrCodeDefault=P(PoCurrCode), PoExchRateDefault=P(ExchRate), PoTaxCode1Default=P(TaxCode1), PoTaxCode2Default=P(TaxCode2), PoB

EventHandler.Name: RunPurchaseOrderLines
EventHandler.Response: PurchaseOrderLines( SETVARVALUES(ParentFormName=PurchaseOrders) LINKBY(PoNum=PoNum) RLACS() SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(PoTypeOnLink=P(Type), PoStatDefault=P(Stat), PoOrderDateDefault=P(OrderDate), PoVendNumDefault=P(VendNum), VenadrNameDefault=P(VendorName), PoVendorPoDefault=P(VendOrder), DerPoChangeNumDefault=P(DerPchChgNum), DerPoChangeStatDefault=P(DerPchStat), CurrCodeDefault=P(PoCurrCode), PoExchRateDefault=P(ExchRate), PoTaxCode1Default=P(TaxCode1), PoTaxCode2Default=P(TaxCode2), PoTaxFreeM

EventHandler.Name: SetVendorWhseDefault
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLPos.VendorWhseDefaultSp( PARMS(VAR P(VendNum), RVAR P(Whse), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLPos.PurchaseOrderPreDisplaySP( PARMS(RVAR V(Poparms_AmendPo), RVAR V(Poparms_PoChange), RVAR V(Poparms_VendorRequired), RVAR V(VarTrackTaxFreeImports), RVAR V(VarCountry)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLFormAdoption.LoadBannerStatus( PARMS(VAR V(CurrentFormName), RVAR V(DisableBanner), RVAR V(EndOfSupport), RVAR V(NewFormName), RVAR V(ToastStatus)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLPos.CheckVendRcptStatusSp( PARMS(VAR P(PoNum), RVAR V(PReceived), VAR 0, MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLFormExtMsgEntities.FormatJSONVar( PARMS(VAR PurchaseOrders, VAR V(JSONVarNotInterpret), RVAR V(JSONVarWithLIT)) COLID(object) )

EventHandler.Name: ToggleButtonBar
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace Mongoose.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_ToggleButtonBar_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() If ThisForm.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").Value = "1" Then ThisForm.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").SetValue("0") Else ThisForm.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").Set
EventHandler.Response2: Value("1") End If ReturnValue = "0" End Sub End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Name: UpdateExchangeRate
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLApParms.GetVendExchRateSp( PARMS(VAR P(VendNum), VAR P(OrderDate), VAR P(PoCurrCode), RVAR P(ExchRate), MESSAGE, VAR 1) )

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL0BlanketOrderTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL0( OBJ(SLPoBlns) DISPLAY(2,3,4) OBJNAME(sTree_POform_BlnkLine) PROPERTIES(PoNum, PoLine, Item, ItmDescription) FILTER(PoNum = 'P(PoNum)'))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL0Detailtree
Variable.Value: LEVEL0( OBJ(SLPoItems) OBJNAME(Line: (Detailtree,2) ,Item: (Detailtree,3) ,Desc: (Detailtree,4) ,Qty Ordered: (Detailtree,5) ,Due Date: (Detailtree,6) ) PROPERTIES(PoLine, Item, ItmDescription, QtyOrderedConv, DueDate))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL0RegularOrderTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL0( OBJ(SLPoItems) DISPLAY(2,4,5,6,7) OBJNAME(sTree_POform_RegLine) PROPERTIES(PoNum, PoLine, PoRelease, Item, Description, QtyOrderedConv, DueDate) FILTER(PoNum = 'P(PoNum)'))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL1BlanketOrderTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL1( OBJ(SLPoItems) DISPLAY(3,4,5) OBJNAME(sTree_POform_BlnkRel) PROPERTIES(PoNum, PoLine, PoRelease, QtyOrderedConv, DueDate) LINKBY(PoNum=PoNum,PoLine=PoLine))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL1Detailtree
Variable.Value: LEVEL1( OBJ(SLPoRcpts) OBJNAME(Date Received: (Detailtree,2) ,Qty Received: (Detailtree,3) ,Qty Returned: (Detailtree,4)) PROPERTIES(RcvdDate, DerQtyReceivedConv, DerQtyReturnedConv))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL1RegularOrderTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL1( OBJ(SLPoRcpts) DISPLAY(4,6,7) OBJNAME(sTree_POform_RegShip) PROPERTIES(PoNum, PoLine, PoRelease, RcvdDate, DateSeq, DerQtyReceivedConv, DerQtyReturnedConv) LINKBY(PoNum=PoNum,PoLine=PoLine))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL2BlanketOrderTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL2( OBJ(Slporcpts) DISPLAY(4,6,7) OBJNAME(sTree_POform_BlnkShip) PROPERTIES(PoNum, PoLine, PoRelease, RcvdDate, DateSeq, DerQtyReceivedConv, DerQtyReturnedConv) LINKBY(PoNum=PoNum,PoLine=PoLine,PoRelease=PoRelease))

Variable.Name: ehm1_ValidateVendor0
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(NewRecord), VAR P(VendNum), VAR P(DerOldVendNum), VAR P(PoNum), VAR P(OrderDate), RVAR P(PoCurrCode), RVAR P(Whse), RVAR P(WhsName), RVAR P(TermsCode), RVAR P(TermsCodeDesc), RVAR P(ShipCode), RVAR P(ShipCodeDesc), RVAR P(VendCategory), RVAR P(VendCatDesc), RVAR P(Fob), RVAR P(PrintPrice), RVAR P(FormatedVendAddress), RVAR P(DerIsFixed), RVAR P(ExchRate), RVAR P(TaxCode1), RVAR P(Tx1Description), RVAR P(TaxCode2), RVAR P(Tx2Description), RVAR P(TransNat), RVAR P(TransNatDesc), RVAR P
Variable.Value2: (TransNat2), RVAR P(TransNat2Desc), RVAR P(Delterm), RVAR P(DelTermDescription), RVAR P(ProcessInd), MESSAGE, RVAR P(VendType), RVAR P(VendContact), RVAR P(VendPhone), RVAR P(VenLcrReqd), RVAR P(CurrAmtFormat), RVAR P(CurrAmtTotFormat),)

Variable.Name: ehm2_ValidateVendor0
Variable.Value: PARMS2( RVAR P(CurrCstPrcFormat), RVAR P(VendorName), RVAR P(VendCountry), RVAR P(VendFaxNum), RVAR P(VendTelexNum), RVAR P(AutoVoucher), Rbool P(AutoReceiveDemandingSitePo), Rbool P(AutoShipDemandingSiteCo), RVAR P(SourceSite), RVAR P(IncludeTaxInCost))

Variable.Name: lsp_VendNumEdit
Variable.Value: PROPERTIES(VendNum, Name, CurrCode, VendType, TermsCode, Fob, ShipCode, Whse, Contact, Phone, VadFaxNum, VadTelexNum, LcrReqd, CurrAmtFormat, CurrAmtTotFormat, CurrCstPrcFormat, VadCountry, Buyer, IncludeTaxInCost, VadPayHold, DerVendCurrCount)

Variable.Name: lsp_VendNumGridCol
Variable.Value: PROPERTIES(VendNum, Name, CurrCode, VendType, TermsCode, Fob, ShipCode, Whse, Contact, Phone, VadFaxNum, VadTelexNum, LcrReqd, CurrAmtFormat, CurrAmtTotFormat, CurrCstPrcFormat, VadCountry, Buyer, IncludeTaxInCost, VadPayHold, DerVendCurrCount)

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: If ThisForm.Variables("vPoStat").Value = "O" And ThisForm.Variables("vVendNum").Value = "" And sVendRequired = "1" Then
If ThisForm.Variables("vPchChgNum").Value <> "" And ThisForm.Variables("vChgStat").Value <> "P" And (ThisForm.Variables("vPoStat").Value = "C" Or ThisForm.Variables("vPoStat").Value = "H") Then
If Response = vbYes Or Response = vbOK Then
((bSensitive And (Not bExistsItem) And (Not bExistsBlanket)) Or bIsNew) And (Not bConsignRefByItemWhse)
((bSensitive And (Not bExistsItem) And (Not bExistsBlanket)) Or bIsNew) And (Not bConsignRefByItemWhse)
ThisForm.Components("VendNumEdit").Enabled = (bIsNew Or bUpdatable) And (Not bConsignRefByItemWhse) And (Not bReceipted Or bNullVendor)
ThisForm.Components("VendNumGridCol").Enabled = (bIsNew Or bUpdatable) And (Not bConsignRefByItemWhse) And (Not bReceipted Or bNullVendor)
And Not FixedVar And (Not bExistsItem Or Not bFixedRate) And bUpdatable And bAllowCurrateOverride
' If Tax Code 2 exists, then set tax amount field captions
'Check if PO Change Order functionality is necessary.
If strOldStat = "O" And (ParamPoChg = "S" Or ParamPoChg = "A") Then
If bFlagPochange = 1 And strOldStat <> strStat And strStat = "C" Then
If Not ThisForm.Components("PrepaidAmtEdit").InputMask.Equals(strAmtMask) And Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(strAmtMask) Then
'Refresh collection if the Refresh Flag is set on.
